script: ST=$(curl -s -H 'Metadata:true' 'http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2018-02-01&resource=48ac35b8-9aa8-4d74-927d-1f4a14a0b239' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))'); RAW=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $ST" 'https://api.interfaces.records.teams.microsoft.com/Skype.Policy/policies/TeamsAppPermissionPolicy?tag=Global'); echo "$RAW" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(json.dumps(d,indent=2))' 2>&1 | head -60
